+/// packet using the per-context resolver query builder.
 #[cfg_attr(not(debug_assertions), unsafe(no_mangle))]
 #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
 pub unsafe extern "C" fn __res_context_mkquery(
-    _ctx: *mut c_void,
-    _op: c_int,
-    _dname: *const c_char,
-    _class: c_int,
-    _type: c_int,
-    _data: *const c_void,
-    _datalen: c_int,
-    _newrr: *const c_void,
-    _buf: *mut c_void,
-    _buflen: c_int,
+    ctx: *mut c_void,
+    op: c_int,
+    dname: *const c_char,
+    class: c_int,
+    type_: c_int,
+    data: *const c_void,
+    datalen: c_int,
+    newrr: *const c_void,
+    buf: *mut c_void,
+    buflen: c_int,
 ) -> c_int {
-    -1
+    unsafe {
+        crate::glibc_internal_abi::__res_nmkquery(
+            ctx, op, dname, class, type_, data, datalen, newrr, buf, buflen,
+        )
+    }
 }
